title: UK-Sandeel (The European Union v. the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland)
description: A dispute has arisen between the European Union and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland (United Kingdom) under the Trade and Cooperation Agreement between the European Union and the European Atomic Energy Community and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland concluded on 30 December 2020 (Trade and Cooperation Agreement). On 16 April 2024, the European Union requested consultations with the United Kingdom under Part Six of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement concerning the United Kingdom’s decision to prohibit the fishing of sandeel in the English waters of the North Sea and in all Scottish waters. The consultations concluded without a mutually agreed solution. On 25 October 2024, the European Union served on the United Kingdom a request to establish an arbitration tribunal under Article 739 of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement. On 18 November 2024, the Arbitration Tribunal was established pursuant to Article 740 of the Trade and Cooperation Agreement.
